Class DeclaresDoubleCommand

java.lang.Object
Controller.Commands.Command
Controller.Commands.DeclaresDoubleCommand
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public class DeclaresDoubleCommand extends Command
Command for declaring the use of double components (engines or cannons). Players declare how many double components they want to activate.
See Also:

      public DeclaresDoubleCommand(String playerName, DoubleType doubleType, double amount)

      playerName - the name of the player making the declaration
      doubleType - the type of double component
      amount - the amount to declare

    • execute

      public void execute(Controller controller) throws InvalidCommand, InvalidParameters, InvalidMethodParameters, InvalidContextualAction

      Parameters:
      controller - the controller to execute the command on
